CORE Shapeshifting Research Atlas

Catalog supernatural, occult, metaphysical, cultural, and speculative biological claims with explicit evidence labels. Do not treat metaphysical claims as established biomedical fact.

The ChatGPT 5.5 Pro console uses the uploaded Internal Core System Gateway as a local model profile. In this static build it performs local synthesis from archive, profile, uploaded reference metadata, and extraction-job state; true web fetching or OpenAI model execution requires a backend/API connector.

Internal Model Core

ChatGPT 5.5 Pro Internal Core / Local internal model profile / connector-ready. Gateway: fetchInternalData(target_id) at /resource/fetch.

ErydirCeisiwr Backend Mechanics Core: Internal routing and synthesis scaffold derived from the ErydirCeisiwr attachment request. It controls how prompts, profiles, source records, extraction jobs, and exports are staged inside the static build.

Parallel Extract API

Local endpoint: /api/extract. Upstream endpoint: https://api.parallel.ai/v1/extract. Authentication: Server-side PARALLEL_API_KEY.

Local Web Scraper

Local endpoint: /api/scrape. Authentication: No API key; public http/https targets only. Keyword mode: True. Hidden search base: https://www.google.com/search?q=. Safeguards: Blocks localhost/private/reserved IPs by default, 2 MB fetch cap, No JavaScript execution.

Google Programmable Search

Search engine ID: 56f7592d1993141c3. Script URL: https://cse.google.com/cse.js?cx=56f7592d1993141c3. Public URL: https://cse.google.com/cse?cx=56f7592d1993141c3#gsc.tab=0.

Automated AI Research Bot

0 findings logged; 0 accepted into source sections. Cadence: opt-in, one attempt per minute, pauses for user review.

File Import Layer

0 imported file logs; 0 source records created from uploaded files.

In-App Browser

0 captured browser targets.

NVIDIA AIQ Research

Backend URL: http://localhost:8000. Status: Optional local/self-hosted research backend.

Uploaded Reference Layer
